labels.ideal_content_profile: Slapstick fails, pet chaos, exaggerated reaction faces — timing-driven comedic beats.
Sight-gag b-roll with deadpan reactions; mockumentary cuts and awkward pauses.
Friend-group antics, daytime b-roll with playful energy, fast cuts.
Quiet emotional b-roll — letters, hands, candid family laughter at golden hour.
Wide landscapes, heroic close-ups, trailer-style storytelling.
